query: INSERT INTO passcodes (device_code_sha256, principal, passcode_sha256, expires_at, attempts, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 0, $5) ON CONFLICT (device_code_sha256, principal) DO UPDATE SET passcode_sha256 = excluded.passcode_sha256, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, attempts = 0, created_at = excluded.created_at
